content.text: I'll start by inspecting the cluster state.

input.command:
NS=karma-rabbitmq-maximal-lifecycle-roll-af2b323e-cluster-a
kubectl -n $NS get pods
echo "---POLICIES---"
kubectl -n $NS exec rabbitmq-0 -- rabbitmqctl list_policies -p /app
echo "---QUEUES---"
kubectl -n $NS exec rabbitmq-0 -- rabbitmqctl list_queues -p /app name type policy
echo "---VHOSTS---"
kubectl -n $NS exec rabbitmq-0 -- rabbitmqctl list_vhosts
